$comment: Landmark photography for the homepage hero + gallery strip. Drop real, licensed photos into public/img/dubai/ using these basenames in ANY common format (.jpg/.jpeg/.avif/.webp/.png — e.g. burj-khalifa-night.avif works) — entries whose file is missing are skipped automatically at build time. Order matters: first existing image leads the hero slideshow.
